Latte tag: block.description: Latte tag: Defines a named block: {block name}...{/block}.

Latte tag: local block.description: Latte tag: Defines a local block: {block local name}...{/block}.

Latte tag: sandbox.description: Latte tag: Renders an untrusted template in sandbox mode: {sandbox file}.

Latte tag: try.description: Latte tag: Starts a recoverable try block: {try}...{/try}.

Latte tag: rollback.description: Latte tag: Rolls back output inside a {try} block.

Latte tag: embed.description: Latte tag: Embeds a template and allows block overrides: {embed file}...{/embed}.

Latte tag: snippet.description: Latte tag: Defines an AJAX snippet block: {snippet name}...{/snippet}.

Latte include: import.description: Latte tag: Imports blocks from another template: {import file}.

Latte include: layout.description: Latte tag: Selects the layout template: {layout file}.

Latte include: extends.description: Latte tag: Extends another template: {extends file}.

Latte tag: capture.description: Latte tag: Captures rendered output into a variable: {capture $var}...{/capture}.

Latte tag: define.description: Latte tag: Defines a reusable block: {define name}...{/define}.

Latte include: block reference.description: Latte tag: Includes a block by name: {include #block}.

Latte include: named block.description: Latte tag: Includes a named block: {include block name}.

Latte include: template file.description: Latte tag: Includes another template file: {include file}.

Latte include: block from template.description: Latte tag: Includes a block from another template: {include block from file}.

Latte flow: foreach.description: Latte flow: Loops over items: {foreach $items as $item}...{/foreach}.

Latte flow: while.description: Latte flow: Repeats while an expression is truthy: {while ...}...{/while}.

Latte flow: iterateWhile.description: Latte flow: Continues iteration with {iterateWhile} inside a loop.

Latte flow: for.description: Latte flow: Creates a counted loop: {for $i = 0; ...}...{/for}.

Latte flow: first.description: Latte flow: Renders content only on the first loop iteration: {first}...{/first}.

Latte flow: last.description: Latte flow: Renders content only on the last loop iteration: {last}...{/last}.

Latte flow: separator.description: Latte flow: Renders separator content between loop items: {sep}...{/sep}.

Latte flow: continueIf.description: Latte flow: Continues the loop when a condition is true: {continueIf $cond}.

Latte flow: skipIf.description: Latte flow: Skips rendering when a condition is true: {skipIf $cond}.

Latte flow: switch.description: Latte flow: Creates a switch block with cases: {switch expr}...{/switch}.

Latte flow: breakIf.description: Latte flow: Breaks the loop when a condition is true: {breakIf $cond}.

Latte flow: ifset.description: Latte flow: Renders when a value is set: {ifset $var}...{/ifset}.

Latte flow: ifchanged.description: Latte flow: Renders when an expression changes: {ifchanged expr}...{/ifchanged}.

Latte tag: cache.description: Latte tag: Caches rendered output: {cache key}...{/cache}.

Latte variable: default.description: Latte tag: Defines a default template variable: {default $name = value}.

Nette link: link.description: Nette tag: Creates a presenter link: {link Destination}.

Nette link: plink.description: Nette tag: Creates an absolute presenter link: {plink Destination}.

Nette component: control.description: Nette tag: Renders a component/control: {control name}.

Nette form: form.description: Nette form: Renders a form block: {form name}...{/form}.

Nette form: formPrint.description: Nette form: Prints a complete form: {formPrint name}.

Latte type: varPrint.description: Latte type: Prints inferred template variables: {varPrint name}.

Latte variable: var.description: Latte tag: Declares a template variable: {var $name = value}.

Latte type: parameters.description: Latte type: Declares template parameters: {parameters type $name}.

Latte type: varType.description: Latte type: Annotates a variable type: {varType type $var}.

Latte type: templateType.description: Latte type: Annotates the template parameter class: {templateType Class}.

Latte type: templatePrint.description: Latte type: Generates template type information: {templatePrint Class}.

Nette form: label.description: Nette form: Renders a form label: {label field /}.

Nette form: input.description: Nette form: Renders a form input: {input field}.

Latte tag: syntax.description: Latte tag: Switches Latte syntax mode: {syntax mode}...{/syntax}.

Latte tag: spaceless.description: Latte tag: Removes whitespace between HTML tags: {spaceless}...{/spaceless}.

Latte escape: left brace.description: Latte tag: Prints a literal opening brace with {l}.

Latte escape: right brace.description: Latte tag: Prints a literal closing brace with {r}.

Latte comment: block comment.description: Latte comment: Inserts a Latte block comment: {* comment *}.

Latte translator: message.description: Latte tag: Translates a message with {_'message'}.

Latte translator: message with context.description: Latte tag: Translates a message with context: {_'message', context}.

Latte expression: ternary.description: Latte expression: Inserts a ternary output expression: {$cond ? a : b}.

Latte output: contentType.description: Latte tag: Sets the output content type: {contentType application/xml}.

Latte output: status.description: Latte tag: Sets the HTTP response status: {status 500}.

Latte expression: do.description: Latte tag: Executes an expression without output: {do expr}.

Latte debug: dump.description: Latte debug: Dumps a variable for debugging: {dump $var}.

Latte tag: php.description: Latte tag: Runs PHP-like code inside a Latte tag: {php code}.

Latte debug: debugbreak.description: Latte debug: Triggers a debugger break conditionally: {debugbreak $cond}.

Latte function: clamp.description: Latte function: Outputs a clamped value: {=clamp(value, min, max)}.

Latte filter: substr.description: Latte filter: Extracts part of a string: |substr:offset,length.

Latte filter: trim.description: Latte filter: Trims characters from text: |trim.

Latte filter: webalize.description: Latte filter: Converts text to a URL-friendly slug: |webalize.

Latte filter: toAscii.description: Latte filter: Transliterates text to ASCII: |toAscii.

Latte filter: replaceRE.description: Latte filter: Replaces text using a regular expression: |replaceRE:pattern,replace.

Latte filter: padLeft.description: Latte filter: Pads text on the left: |padLeft:length.

Latte filter: padRight.description: Latte filter: Pads text on the right: |padRight:length.

Latte filter: nl2br.description:
Latte filter: Converts line breaks to
tags: |nl2br.

Latte filter: lower.description: Latte filter: Converts text to lowercase: |lower.

Latte filter: upper.description: Latte filter: Converts text to uppercase: |upper.

Latte filter: firstUpper.description: Latte filter: Uppercases the first character: |firstUpper.

Latte filter: dataStream.description: Latte filter: Converts data to a data stream: |dataStream:mimetype.

Latte filter: url.description: Latte filter: Escapes text for URL output: |url.

Latte filter: length.description: Latte filter: Returns the length of a value: |length.

Latte filter: clamp.description: Latte filter: Clamps a value between min and max: |clamp:(min, max).

Latte filter: json.description: Latte filter: Encodes a value as JSON: |json.

Latte filter: nocheck.description: Latte filter: Disables content checks for this output: |nocheck.

Latte attribute: n:class.description: Latte attribute: Adds conditional classes with n:class.

Latte attribute: n:attr.description: Latte attribute: Adds dynamic attributes with n:attr.

Latte attribute: n:ifcontent.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when it has content.

Latte attribute: n:ifchanged.description: Latte attribute: Renders an element only when content changes.

Latte attribute: n:foreach.description: Latte attribute: Repeats an element for each item.

Latte attribute: n:inner-foreach.description: Latte attribute: Repeats only the element contents for each item.

Latte attribute: n:tag-if.description: Latte attribute: Conditionally renders the HTML tag itself.

Latte attribute: n:href.description: Latte attribute: Creates a presenter link in an href-like attribute.

Latte attribute: n:snippet.description: Latte attribute: Marks an element as an AJAX snippet.

Nette form attribute: n:name.description: Nette form: Binds an element to a form control name.

Nette form attribute: n:input.description: Nette form: Binds an element to a form input.

Nette form attribute: n:validation.description: Nette form: Binds validation output to a form field.

Latte attribute: n:nonce.description: Latte attribute: Adds a CSP nonce attribute.
